svg.content: <mxGraphModel> <root> <mxCell id="0"/> <mxCell id="1" parent="0"/> <object id="testclient" label="SystemE2EIT<br>(Maven Client)"> <mxCell style="shape=actor;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E1D5E7;strokeColor=#9673a6;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="50" y="100" width="60" height="80" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> </object> <object id="sandbox" label="Sandbox /events"> <mxCell style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#DAE8FC;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="250" y="60" width="120" height="60" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> </object> <object id="engine" label="Engine Sidecar"> <mxCell style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#D5E8D4;strokeColor=#82b366;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="450" y="60" width="120" height="60" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> </object> <object id="nessie" label="Nessie Catalog"> <mxCell style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=15;fillColor=#FFF2CC;strokeColor=#d6b656;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="650" y="160" width="120" height="80" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> </object> <mxCell id="e1" value="1. POST 1000 events" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.25;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" edge="1" parent="1" source="testclient" target="sandbox"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" value="2. POST /flush" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.75;entryX=0.25;entryY=1;" edge="1" parent="1" source="testclient" target="sandbox"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" value="CBOR events" style="edgeStyle=none;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" edge="1" parent="1" source="sandbox" target="engine"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" value="Commit Iceberg" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;" edge="1" parent="1" source="engine" target="nessie"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"/> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" value="3. Assert count == 1000" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;" edge="1" parent="1" source="testclient" target="nessie"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"><mxPoint x="80" y="200"/></Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel>
